underlying_goal: Implement a custom font size feature for a clock widget in an Android launcher app, including brainstorming, planning, implementation, bug fixing, and PR preparation
friction_detail: SeekBarPreference used android:min instead of app:min causing slider to go to 0, and force-push created messy PR history the user didn't want.
brief_summary: User wanted to implement a clock font size slider feature in their Android launcher, and achieved it through iterative brainstorming, implementation, bug fixing (min value, flickering), and PR prep, with some friction around preference XML attributes and git history.
